name: rung_70_spacing_multi_branch_inverse_repair
utterances: Oren has Nia as a parent.
Pax has Nia as a parent.
If X is a parent of Y then X is an ancestor of Y.
If X is an ancestor of Y and Y is an ancestor of Z then X is an ancestor of Z.
Actually retract this if it appears reversed: parent(quin, oren).
Actually retract this if it appears reversed: parent(rae, pax).
Is Mara an ancestor of Rae?
